# Pull Request: AIOGF Contribution

Thank you for contributing to the AI Operational Governance Framework (AIOGF).

Before submitting, please confirm the following:

## Contribution Checklist
- [ ] I have reviewed the **Contributor Terms of Use**.
- [ ] My contribution follows the AIOGF structure, terminology, and metadata standards.
- [ ] I used the approved templates where applicable.
- [ ] I confirm that all content is original and does not include copyrighted or proprietary material.
- [ ] I have disclosed any AI assistance used in drafting this contribution.

## Contribution Type
Select all that apply:

- [ ] Content contribution (supplement, annex, control, etc.)
- [ ] Technical review or corrections
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Structural or organizational enhancement
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Description of Contribution
Provide a clear summary of what this PR adds, changes, or fixes.

## Related Sections
List any supplements, annexes, or files affected.

## Additional Notes
(Optional)
